provenance.prompt: photorealistic documentary photograph, overhead or elevated angle for clear visibility, even neutral lighting, no lens blur, no bokeh, sharp focus across the entire frame, no vignette, no artistic filter, top-down photograph of exactly twelve identical brown cardboard boxes arranged in a three-by-four grid on a plain grey warehouse floor, studio lighting, each box clearly separated with gaps between rows and columns, no box stacked on another, sharp focus
provenance.negative_prompt: motion blur, soft focus, shallow depth of field, bokeh, lens flare, grainy film, stylized art, illustration, painting, cartoon, anime, watermark, text overlay, logo, signature, frame border, duplicate frame, split screen
